label: Graphs, hypergraphs & relational data

node.definition: Relational structures encode entities, interactions, molecules, networks, and non-Euclidean domains.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Graphs, hypergraphs & relational data is modeled as depending on Graph theory, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors and feeding downstream nodes such as Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas, Message passing & neighborhood aggregation, Graph neural networks.

limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Graph theory, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors.

dependencies.rationale: Graphs, hypergraphs & relational data rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Graph theory.
